h1: Custom Awards for Employee Recognition & Corporate Milestones
metaTitle: Custom Awards - Perfect Imprints | Corporate Recognition
metaDescription: Order custom awards for employee recognition, safety milestones & corporate events. Browse crystal, acrylic & wood options with engraving. Start here.
introHtml:
Whether you're honoring a decade of service, celebrating a safety milestone, or recognizing top sales performance, custom awards make the moment meaningful. Marketing directors, HR leaders, and business owners turn to Perfect Imprints for tangible tokens that reinforce company values and boost morale.

Our awards category includes crystal and glass sculptures, acrylic blocks, wooden plaques, and unique designs like the Awards in Motion® Afton and Global Ring 8". Many pieces can be laser engraved or screen printed with your logo, a recipient's name, and the achievement date. Options like the Mova® Globe and Optical Book offer a contemporary look that stands out on any desk or shelf.

We understand that recognition programs require consistency and quality. That’s why we offer volume pricing for bulk orders, plus a variety of materials and finishes to match your brand aesthetic. From the sleek Edge Award to the elegant Renoir Award, you’ll find pieces that convey genuine appreciation. Ready to get started? Browse the collection below or contact our team for a quote.

faqs.q: What are the minimum order quantities for custom awards?
faqs.a: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Many crystal and acrylic awards can be ordered in quantities as low as 1 to 5 pieces, while some custom-engraved items may require 10 or more. Contact us for specific MOQs on your chosen award.

faqs.q: What decoration methods are available for awards?
faqs.a: We offer laser engraving, screen printing, and full-color digital print depending on the award material. Crystal and glass pieces are typically laser engraved, while acrylic awards can be screen printed or engraved. Wood awards are often engraved or debossed.

faqs.q: How long does production and delivery take?
faqs.a: Standard production time is 5-10 business days after artwork approval, plus shipping time. Rush orders may be available for an additional fee. We'll provide an estimated ship date when you place your order.

faqs.q: Can I see a sample before placing a bulk order?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer pre-production samples for most awards. There is a nominal fee for the sample, which is often credited back on a qualifying bulk order. Contact your account representative to arrange a sample.

faqs.q: What care instructions apply to crystal or glass awards?
faqs.a: Clean crystal and glass awards with a soft, lint-free cloth and mild glass cleaner. Avoid abrasive materials that could scratch the surface. Acrylic awards should be cleaned with a damp cloth and mild soap; avoid ammonia-based cleaners.

heroAltText: Crystal, acrylic, and wood custom awards with engraved logos and names for employee recognition.
